title: FinanceComplexQA: Benchmarking Agentic Reasoning on Industrial-grade Financial Documents
innovation_summary: FinanceComplexQA: Benchmarking Agentic Reasoning on Industrial-grade Financial Documents: To evaluate the overall capability of agents, we introduce FinanceComplexQA, a comprehensive open-ended generation benchmark for financial documents that closely resembles real-world scenarios.
